Subject: RE: Macron to visit Washington next week
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Hi all,

Quick update from Paris. | ioined the start of dinner this evening between Morgan

McSweeney and [hird Party

for a 121 discussion.
ek

before leaving them to it

220

I’ll get a debrief from Morgan first thing tomorrow on the rest of their conversation and will 
report further.
Best wishes, 
Menna
Menna Rawlings
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Subject: RE: Macron to visit Washington next week
OFFICIAL
,
Many thanks.
Yes, Mike Waltz confirmed the visit in a Fox News interview about 30 minutes ago. 
NSC have just told us that they are preparing for a Monday/Tuesday visit.
JCS

Subject: Macron to visit Washington next week
Importance: High
OFFICIAL
Jonathan, Rich,
To be aware French media (BFMTV) are reporting President Macron will visit 
Washington next week "alongside the British Prime Minister, as part of meetings on 
ending the war in Ukraine".
BFMTV have quoted Mike Waltz confirming the visit. The Elysée are yet to comment. 
We'll report as we hear more.
Best,
 | Affaires Etrangères et Stratégiques
Ambassade du Royaume Uni à Paris | 35 Rue du Faubourg St Honoré | 75008 Paris
 Email: 
Royaume-Uni en France: GOV.UK | Facebook | Twitter |Instagram
